title: schizachyrium condensatum var. scabriflorum
intro: Schizachyrium condensatum var. scabriflorum, also known as little bluestem, is a type of flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried roots and leaves can be used in herbal preparations.
